name: homurabi
description: Real Ruby + Sinatra on Cloudflare Workers via Opal

scripts.build:opal: OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -r cloudflare_workers -r homurabi_templates -r homurabi_assets -o build/hello.no-exit.mjs app/hello.rb 2>build/opal.stderr.log
scripts.build: npm run build:erb && npm run build:assets && npm run build:opal
scripts.build:test: ruby bin/compile-erb && OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -r cloudflare_workers -r homurabi_templates -o build/smoke-test.mjs test/smoke.rb 2>build/opal.stderr.log
scripts.clean: rm -f build/hello.no-exit.mjs build/smoke-test.mjs build/homurabi_templates.rb build/homurabi_assets.rb build/opal.stderr.log
